reviews.author: Vlastimil Babka (SUSE)
reviews.summary: Provided a Reviewed-by tag without raising any specific technical concerns or suggestions.

reviews.author: Shakeel Butt
reviews.summary: Provided an Acked-by tag without raising any specific technical concerns or suggestions.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Jul 01, 2026 at 02:21:02PM -0400, Johannes Weiner wrote:
> Gregory points out that these descriptions are cursed and confusing,
> considering what these flags actually do. This is mostly due to
> historic implementation choices and cgroup1 baggage. Improve the
> description of their actual effects.
> 
> Reported-by: Gregory Price <gourry@gourry.net>
> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>

Acked-by: Shakeel Butt <shakeel.butt@linux.dev>

reviews.author: Mike Rapoport (Microsoft)
reviews.summary: Provided an Acked-by tag without raising any specific technical concerns or suggestions.

reviews.author: SJ Park
reviews.summary: Raised a minor point about the Reported-by tag, but acknowledged that it's fine to ignore. Provided an Acked-by tag without raising any specific technical concerns or suggestions.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed,  1 Jul 2026 14:21:02 -0400 Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org> wrote:

> Gregory points out that these descriptions are cursed and confusing,
> considering what these flags actually do. This is mostly due to
> historic implementation choices and cgroup1 baggage. Improve the
> description of their actual effects.
> 
> Reported-by: Gregory Price <gourry@gourry.net>

FWIW, checkpatch.pl complains.

    WARNING: Reported-by: should be immediately followed by Closes: or Link: with a URL to the report

I think it is completely fine to ignore, though.  Hence FWIW.

> Signed-off-by: Johannes Weiner <hannes@cmpxchg.org>

Acked-by: SJ Park <sj@kernel.org>


Thanks,
SJ

[...]

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch updates the documentation for __GFP_ACCOUNT and GFP_KERNEL_ACCOUNT to accurately reflect their effects on memory allocation, specifically accounting to the active cgroup context.
